[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: AI Agent (software & documentation)
- Amount: 0
- Description: Fix mobile overflow on beerhall detail view
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/46
  
  Details:
  Fixed horizontal scroll overflow on mobile for the beerhall digest detail view at truesight.me/beerhall/updates.html.
  
  ### Problem
  Long URLs and unbroken text in digest detail blocks caused horizontal overflow on narrow viewports.
  
  ### Fix
  Added CSS word-breaking to styles/main.css:
  - .ecosystem-detail-body: word-break + overflow-wrap
  - .ecosystem-detail-links: word-break + overflow-wrap
  - .ecosystem-detail-links a: word-break: break-all
  - Added li margin-bottom for readability
  
  Time spent: 10 minutes
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 0
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
